Record Class Double3

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
primitives.Double3
Record Components:
_d1 - first component
_d2 - second component
_d3 - third component
public record Double3(double _d1, double _d2, double _d3) extends Record
Immutable container for three double values.

The class is used as a basic numeric structure in the primitives package. Typical uses include:

  • RGB color components
  • Point or vector coordinates
  • Material or attenuation coefficients

This class is intentionally minimal and optimized for performance, as it is heavily used in geometric and color computations. It performs no argument validation (such as null checks or division-by-zero checks). It assumes correct usage by the calling code.

Author:
Dan Zilberstein

  • Constructor Details

    • Double3

      public Double3(double value)
      Constructor to initialize Double3 based object the same number values
      Parameters:
      value - number value for all 3 numbers

    • Double3

      public Double3(double _d1, double _d2, double _d3)
      Creates an instance of a Double3 record class.
      Parameters:
      _d1 - the value for the _d1 record component
      _d2 - the value for the _d2 record component
      _d3 - the value for the _d3 record component

  • Method Details

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      obj - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the obj argument; false otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • add

      public Double3 add(Double3 rhs)
      Adds this triad to another triad component-wise.
      Parameters:
      rhs - the triad to add
      Returns:
      a new Double3 containing the component-wise sum

    • subtract

      public Double3 subtract(Double3 rhs)
      Subtracts another triad from this triad component-wise.
      Parameters:
      rhs - the triad to subtract
      Returns:
      a new Double3 containing the component-wise difference

    • scale

      public Double3 scale(double rhs)
      Multiplies all components of this triad by a scalar value.
      Parameters:
      rhs - the scaling factor
      Returns:
      a new Double3 containing the scaled values

    • divide

      public Double3 divide(double rhs)
      Divides all components of this triad by a scalar value.
      Parameters:
      rhs - the divisor
      Returns:
      a new Double3 containing the reduced values

    • product

      public Double3 product(Double3 rhs)
      Multiplies this triad with another triad component-wise.
      Parameters:
      rhs - the triad to multiply with
      Returns:
      a new Double3 containing the component-wise product

    • isLowerThan

      public boolean isLowerThan(double k)
      Checks whether all components are smaller than a given value.
      Parameters:
      k - the value to compare against
      Returns:
      true if all components are smaller than k

    • isLowerThan

      public boolean isLowerThan(Double3 other)
      Checks whether all components of this triad are smaller than the corresponding components of another triad.
      Parameters:
      other - the triad to compare with
      Returns:
      true if each component of this triad is smaller than the corresponding component in other
